message.description: Optional message to include in the debug data

query.description: Search query to find entities by name or description

entities.description: Entity types to search. If not specified, searches all types. Available: insight, dashboard, experiment, feature_flag, notebook, action, cohort, event_definition, survey

description.description: Description explaining when the event is triggered

tags.description: Tags to organize events by product area (e.g. "checkout", "onboarding") or user journey stage (e.g. "acquisition", "activation", "monetization", "retention")

verified.description: Mark as verified to indicate the event is properly instrumented and tracking correctly

hidden.description: Mark event as no longer used/captured. Hides it from UI while preserving historical data

eventName.description: The name of the event to update (e.g. "$pageview", "user_signed_up")

description.description: Description explaining when the event is triggered

tags.description: Tags to organize events by product area (e.g. "checkout", "onboarding") or user journey stage (e.g. "acquisition", "activation", "monetization", "retention")

verified.description: Mark as verified to indicate the event is properly instrumented and tracking correctly

hidden.description: Mark event as no longer used/captured. Hides it from UI while preserving historical data

data.description: The event definition data to update

query.description: The final SQL query to be executed.

truncate.description: Whether to truncate large blob/JSON values in results. Defaults to true. Set to false when you need full untruncated results (e.g., for dumping to a file).

experimentId.description: The ID of the experiment to get comprehensive results for

refresh.description: Force refresh of results instead of using cached values

source.description: For new insights, use the query from your successful query-run tool call. For updates, the existing query can optionally be reused.

question.description: Your natural language query describing the SQL insight (max 1000 characters).

source.description: For new insights, use the query from your successful query-run tool call. For updates, the existing query can optionally be reused

dashboards.description: Dashboard IDs this insight should belong to. This is a full replacement — always include all existing dashboard IDs when adding a new one.

q.description: Search query to filter event names. Only use if there are lots of events.

eventName.description: Event name to filter properties by, required for event type

search.description: Optional substring filter applied to prompt names and prompt content.

content.description: Controls how much prompt content is included in list results. 'full' includes the full prompt, 'preview' includes a short prompt_preview, and 'none' omits prompt content entirely.

pathsHogQLExpression.description: A HogQL expression to use as the path step name. Requires includeEventTypes to contain "hogql".

startPoint.description: Only show paths starting at this step

endPoint.description: Only show paths ending at this step

edgeLimit.description: Maximum number of edges to return (default 50)

excludeEvents.description: Events to exclude from the path

pathGroupings.description: Wildcard groups to merge similar path steps

localPathCleaningFilters.description: Regex rules to clean/simplify path step names

limit.description: Number of events to return per page.

offset.description: Number of events to skip for pagination.

event_name.description: The name of the event that you want to retrieve properties for.

entity.description: The type of the entity that you want to retrieve properties for.

action_id.description: The ID of the action that you want to retrieve properties for.

entity.description: The type of the entity that you want to retrieve properties for.

property_name.description: Verified property name of an entity.
Verified property name of an event.
Verified property name of an action.

query.description: The data schema query to execute.

ReadDataWarehouseSchemaSchema.description: No input required. Returns core data warehouse schemas.
